---
name: snippet-writer
version: 1.0.0
description: |
  Writes short code snippets on demand. Given a description, produces a working
  code snippet in the requested language.
  Use when asked to "write a snippet", "give me a code example", or
  "show me how to do X in Y language".
allowed-tools:
  - Read
---

# snippet-writer

Write short code snippets on demand.
